 {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-gc3p","title":"Standardize PlaywrightLogger Usage","description":"## Objective
Ensure all E2E tests utilize the `PlaywrightLogger` for consistent, detailed, and debuggable test outputs.

## Scope
- Audit existing specs in `e2e/web/`.
- Refactor any tests using raw `console.log` or standard Playwright steps to use `logger.step`, `logger.info`, etc.
- Ensure screenshots are captured on failure for all critical steps.

## Criteria for Success
- All E2E tests produce structured JSONL logs.
- Test reports include screenshots for failures.

 {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-gjgc","title":"Fix Next dev server failing when @xenova/transformers missing in semantic search","description":"Next dev server fails on startup with: 'Module not found: Can't resolve @xenova/transformers' from packages/core/src/search/semantic.ts (SpotlightSearch import chain). This blocks Playwright E2E runs and local dev. Fix should keep semantic search optional without requiring the dependency (e.g., computed import string, server-only dynamic import, or conditional load).","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","assignee":"","created_at":"2026-01-13T19:56:33.466908336Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-15T15:43:32.599958272Z","closed_at":"2026-01-15T15:43:32.599958272Z","close_reason":"Fixed by aliasing optional dependency in next.config.ts","compaction_level":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-gjgc","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-51i6","type":"discovered-from","created_at":"2026-01-13T19:56:33.471902305Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"","thread_id":""}]}
-{"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-gn9y","title":"EPIC: Admin Dashboard & Moderation","description":"## Origin
Moved from jeffreysprompts_premium jeffreysprompts_premium-lbq.

## Overview
Admin dashboard and content moderation tools for platform management.

## Access Control
- Admin role in user_profiles (is_admin boolean or role field)
- Middleware to protect /admin routes
- Admin-only API endpoints

## Admin Dashboard Features

### 1. Overview Dashboard (/admin)
- Total users (and growth chart)
- Active subscriptions (MRR)
- Content counts (prompts, packs, skills)
- Recent signups
- Recent activity

### 2. User Management (/admin/users)
- Search/filter users
- View user details
- View user's content
- Impersonate user (careful!)
- Suspend/ban user
- Adjust subscription manually

### 3. Content Moderation (/admin/moderation)
- Queue of reported content
- Review and take action (approve, remove, warn)
- View reporter info
- Appeal handling

### 4. Featured Content (/admin/featured)
- Mark prompts/packs/skills as featured
- Manage "Prompt of the Day"
- Editor's picks curation

### 5. System Settings (/admin/settings)
- Feature flags
- Maintenance mode toggle
- Global announcements

## Database
- reports (content reports from users)
- admin_actions (audit log of admin actions)
- featured_content (featured items with positions)
- Add is_admin to user_profiles
","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"epic","assignee":"","created_at":"2026-01-11T06:22:23.299330089Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-11T06:22:23.299330089Z","compaction_level":0}

 {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-y60","title":"Implement jfp update-cli self-update command","description":"Part 6.10 of PLAN. Optional self-update flow (disabled by default). Check weekly or 'jfp update-cli' on demand. Download from GitHub releases. Verify checksum (SHA256SUMS.txt). Atomic replace: download → verify → rename. Rollback on failure: keep jfp.bak, restore if new binary fails exec. Respects updates.autoUpdate config setting.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"","created_at":"2026-01-10T05:46:33.288029788Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-10T22:23:22.758720145Z","closed_at":"2026-01-10T22:23:22.758720145Z","close_reason":"Implemented checksum verification, atomic replace + rollback, and update check tracking in update-cli","compaction_level":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-y60","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-xdt","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-10T05:49:25.771789256Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"","thread_id":""}]}
-{"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-y69a","title":"E2E Tests: Staff Picks and Featured Content","description":"## Origin
Moved from jeffreysprompts_premium jeffreysprompts_premium-i53g.

## Task
Create E2E tests for staff picks and featured content functionality.

## Test Scenarios
1. **Staff Picks Display**
   - Staff picks section visible on home
   - Carousel/grid displays correctly
   - Featured badge visible
   - Links work correctly

2. **Admin Feature Flow**
   - Admin can feature content
   - Admin can unfeature content
   - Feature reason/note saved
   - Featured order configurable

3. **Featured Categories**
   - Category-specific features work
   - Featured for X days works
   - Auto-expire features

4. **User Experience**
   - Featured content stands out
   - Click tracking works
   - Mobile display correct

## Logging Requirements
- Log feature/unfeature actions
- Log featured content views
- Log click-through events
- Screenshot featured sections

## Files to Create
- e2e/discovery/staff-picks.spec.ts
- e2e/admin/feature-content.spec.ts
- e2e/lib/feature-helpers.ts

## Success Criteria
- Featuring flow works for admins
- Featured content displays correctly
- Auto-expire functions
- Analytics tracked

 {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-y6lx","title":"E2E Tests: i18n Language Switching","description":"## Origin
Mirror from jeffreysprompts_premium jeffreysprompts_premium-9h5x. Keep both repos in sync.

## Task
Create E2E tests for multi-language switching.

## Why This Matters
- Ensures localization flows work for users
- Prevents regressions in translated routes

## Test Scenarios
1. Switch language from header selector
2. Verify content changes language
3. Persist language preference across reload
4. Fallback to default language when missing translation

## Logging Requirements
- Log selected locale and route
- Screenshot localized pages

## Files to Create
- e2e/i18n/language-switch.spec.ts

## Success Criteria
- Language switching works consistently
- Preference persists
- Fallback behavior correct

 {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-y9yi","title":"Fix swipe gesture RAF race","description":"useSwipeGesture could reset state via a pending RAF after a new swipe begins, causing flicker. Cancel RAF on touch start.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","assignee":"","created_at":"2026-01-12T19:46:10.466871540Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-12T19:46:26.039450903Z","closed_at":"2026-01-12T19:46:26.039450903Z","close_reason":"Cancel pending RAF on touch start to avoid state reset during new swipe","compaction_level":0}
